value_prop.description: the column holding the numeric value of each slice

value_prefix.description: text shown before each value, e.g. "$"

value_suffix.description: text shown after each value, e.g. "%" or " users"

layers.description: one or more grouping layers, innermost ring first (at least one)

discriminator_prop.description: the column whose distinct values become slices (values are summed per group)
